items.title: UK orders Google to improve search transparency to aid competition
items.summary: STORY: Britain’s competition watchdog has ordered Google to give greater transparency on how its search rankings work.It’s part of new rules aimed at securing a "fairer deal" for businesses.And addresses concerns over the U.S. tech giant's dominance in the sector.The regulator said Google must also rank organic search results using objective criteria and introduce clearer complaint processes. Google said it will work with the watchdog, adding that its ranking systems are fair and transparent.These new measures follow UK watchdog requirements announced earlier this month, which enable publishers to stop their content being used to power Google's AI features.Google in March said it was developing new search controls to address British competition concerns.The regulator said Google has six months to implement the fair ranking requirement - and warns of further measures if necessary. This adds to the increasing regulatory scrutiny the tech giant is facing around the world, including in the U.S. and EU.

items.title_kr: 5년간 129% 상승한 Apple(AAPL) 주식은 여전히 ​​가치가 있습니다
items.summary_kr: Apple 주식이 강세를 보인 후에도 여전히 가치를 제공하는지 궁금하다면 대답은 가격과 펀더멘털을 어떻게 보는지에 크게 좌우됩니다. US$299.24의 마지막 종가에서 Apple은 지난 주 동안 3.0%의 수익률을 기록했으며, 과거에는 거의 변동이 없었습니다.

items.title: Strategy (MSTR) Stock After 66% Fall And DCF Upside Potential
items.summary: If you are wondering whether Strategy stock is starting to look mispriced, the recent share performance gives plenty to think about. At a last close of US$122.81, Strategy has risen 6.5% over the past week. However, it remains down 26.3% over the past month, down 21.9% year to date and down 66.7% over the last year, following a very large 270.7% return over three years and 122.1% over five years. items.title_kr: 66% 하락 후 전략(MSTR) 주식 및 DCF 상승 가능성
items.summary_kr: Strategy 주식의 가격이 잘못 책정된 것처럼 보이기 시작했는지 궁금하다면 최근 주가 실적을 보면 많은 생각을 할 수 있습니다. 마지막 종가는 미화 122.81달러로 지난 주에 Strategy는 6.5% 상승했습니다. 하지만 지난달에는 26.3% 하락세를 유지했다.
